name: Juice Shop — SQL injection in login via raw email interpolation

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Login Admin.

notes: req.body.email is concatenated straight into a raw Sequelize SELECT via template literal. Payload "' OR 1=1--" as the email bypasses authentication and logs in as the first user (admin). Fix uses :email / :password replacements.
